name: Hidden Word Puzzle
description: Hidden Word Puzzle Game Challenge your vocabulary and observation skills in this classic word search puzzle! The goal is simple: find the secret word hidden within a grid of jumbled letters. With multiple grid sizes, difficulty options, and two languages to choose from (English and Russian), this game offers endless fun for word enthusiasts of all levels. Whether you have a few minutes to spare or want to dive into a longer challenge, Hidden Word Puzzle is the perfect way to keep your mind sharp.
